info.name: 30. Use Case - Rujukan Pasien
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT)

For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT)

Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current)

Silakan **akses riwayat perubahan** pada Playbook dan pelajari API Collection (Postman).

| **Folder History** | **Editor** | **Date** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| V1 | Anisatul 'Afifah | 23 Feb 2026 |
